title: Refactor: Implement observer pattern for events
original_text: Refactored to use observer pattern for event handling. Created observable subjects and observer interfaces. Implemented event bus for decoupled communication. Added event listeners for business events. This reduces coupling between components. Added tests for observer pattern. Result: 38 tests pass.
expected_subject: refactor(pattern): implement observer pattern for events
expected_body_lines: - Create observable subjects and observer interfaces
- Implement event bus for decoupled communication
- Add event listeners for business events
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(pattern): implement observer pattern for events"
